top_categories.workout_context: When someone attacks on flat South Florida roads with bridge crossings, you have 10 seconds to respond or you're off the back. This builds that response.
Race-pace efforts that mimic GFNY Miami's demands. Pacing, fueling, and tactical decisions under fatigue. Practice the race before November.
71 miles on flat South Florida roads with bridge crossings burns energy faster than the distance suggests. Train the fade resistance now.
GFNY Miami's flat South Florida roads with bridge crossings rewards steady threshold power. Surging and recovering costs more watts than just holding.
88–92% FTP is where you'll spend the hardest sustained miles of GFNY Miami. Train it until it feels boring.
GFNY Miami's flat South Florida roads with bridge crossings forces constant power changes. Surge over the rough stuff, settle on the smooth, repeat for 71 miles.
2-minute all-out efforts on flat South Florida roads with bridge crossings. Closing gaps, responding to attacks, sprinting for position. Train the burn.
Double-threshold training builds sustained power with less fatigue. More FTP per hour of training.
Long rides with hard efforts mixed in. Simulates what GFNY Miami's flat South Florida roads with bridge crossings actually does to you.
Base fitness for GFNY Miami. Without this, the hard workouts break you down instead of building you up.
At GFNY Miami, surges push you above threshold and you have to recover while still riding. Over-unders train exactly that.
How long can you hold 105% FTP before you blow? At GFNY Miami, that number decides whether you bridge or get dropped.

race_overlay.nutrition: Target 40–60g carbs/hour for GFNY Miami’s 71 miles. Front-load calories in the first half. One bottle per hour minimum, more in heat.

pack_summary: This 10-workout pack focuses on VO2max, Race Simulation, and Durability to prepare you for 71 miles of flat south florida roads with bridge crossings in Miami, Florida, USA.
